## Summary

- What changed?
- Why does it belong in the public repository?

## Scope

- [ ] Shared logic
- [ ] Public product
- [ ] Flavor overlay
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] GitHub/project hygiene

## Validation

- [ ] `bash -n` on touched scripts
- [ ] Local dry-run or runtime validation
- [ ] Updated documentation when behavior changed

## Notes

- Public/private boundary considered
- Redistributability considered
